creator: m.seaman@infracaninophile.co.uk
text:
Another security bugfix release from phpmyadmin:

Announce Message:

  "Welcome to this second security update for phpMyAdmin 2.11.9.

   Download from http://phpmyadmin.net; details will follow on our
   website in the Security section.

   Marc Delisle, for the team"

Release Notes:

   http://www.phpmyadmin.net/home_page/downloads.php?relnotes=1

or

  https://sourceforge.net/project/shownotes.php?release_id=628013

Details of the vulnerability have not yet been released, other than the
statement:

  XSS in MSIE using NUL byte, thanks to JPCERT.
